data.title: Parkview Health to build $200 million, 40-bed hospital in West Lafayette to serve Tippecanoe County.
data.description: A new health system is set to cater to the expanding population of Tippecanoe County with the construction of a 40-bed hospital, backed by a significant $200 million investment. Parkview Health has announced its plans for the development in West Lafayette, Indiana, which is poised to provide essential healthcare services to the local community. The project highlights a commitment to bolstering the region's medical infrastructure to meet the increasing healthcare needs of residents. Additionally, the Purdue Research Foundation offers supplemental information related to this initiative.

data.title: Figma stock skyrockets during IPO, becoming one of the top IPOs of the year.
data.description: Software design company Figma experienced a significant surge on its debut trading day following its initial public offering. Figma's stock stood out as one of the most notable IPOs of the year. The successful IPO attracted considerable attention from investors, reflecting the company's strong market presence.

data.title: Palantir stock up 111% in 2025. Citi expects revenue beat for Q2 earnings report, shares hit new high.
data.description: After a surge of 111% in 2025, Palantir stock is generating high expectations as the firm prepares to release its Q2 earnings report. Analysts at Citi anticipate a revenue beat. Following this news, Palantir shares reached a new high but later experienced a slight pullback.

data.title: AI data center growth boosts infrastructure firms Vertiv and Applied Digital. Positive outlook.
data.description: The accelerated expansion of AI data centers is proving beneficial for infrastructure companies Vertiv and Applied Digital. This growth in AI data center construction is driving success for these firms, as reported by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Reddit stock rallying before Q2 report, focus on user growth. Report due later today.
data.description: Today, Reddit is witnessing an increase in its stock value as investors anticipate its second-quarter earnings report, scheduled for later today. The focus will be on the platform's user growth. This surge in Reddit's stock price comes ahead of the quarterly report, with investors closely monitoring the numbers.

data.title: Lincoln Electric beats earnings estimates, shares surge 9% to 52-week high with strong profit growth. Stock upgrade to 82.
data.description: Lincoln Electric has demonstrated an enhanced price performance, resulting in an upgrade of its IBD Relative Strength Rating from 78 to 82. The company exceeded earnings estimates, leading to a 9% surge in its shares. This increase propelled Lincoln Electric to a 52-week high, reflecting robust profit growth.

Federal Reserve Board joins other federal financial institution regulatory agencies in providing banks the flexibility to use an alternative method for collecting certain customer identification information

data.title: GEMtrust DAO introduces GEM DiCom, a digital commodity backed by gemstone reserves and blockchain transparency.
data.description: GEMtrust DAO has introduced GEM DiCom, a digital commodity challenging the perception of tokenized gemstones versus conventional hard assets. Helmut Bauer, the Chief Marketing Officer, highlighted the decision to focus on gemstones, addressing concerns about their lack of liquidity and transparency compared to assets like gold. According to Bauer, while gold has long been part of financial systems, gemstones have been excluded due to transparency issues. By leveraging blockchain and prioritizing data, GEMtrust aims to address this barrier and allow gemstones to become a part of serious investment portfolios. GEM DiCom stands out as a market-driven digital asset linked transparently to certified gemstone reserves held in Swiss vaults. Unlike stablecoins, GEM DiCom offers investors a unique opportunity within the tokenized commodities landscape.

data.title: Guardant Health's Q2 earnings beat expectations, leading to an increase in FY25 sales guidance from $880 million-$890 million to $915 million-$925 million.
data.description: Guardant Health, Inc. announced that they surpassed expectations for their second-quarter financial results and raised their sales guidance for FY2025. The company, listed on NASDAQ as GH, originally aimed for sales between $880.00 million-$890.00 million, but they have revised this to $915.00 million-$925.00 million. Helmy Eltoukhy, the co-founder and co-CEO, shared that the company experienced remarkable success in Q2, with significant growth in the Guardant360 Liquid segment. He mentioned that their year-over-year growth has been accelerating for four consecutive quarters. Additionally, in May, Guardant introduced 11 innovative applications for Smart Liquid Biopsy.

data.title: Inventor from Phoenix develops EASY VAC central vacuum system for vehicle interiors to keep clean, neat - PBT-4199.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on July 31, 2025, a Phoenix, Arizona inventor shared their creation, the EASY VAC, a new vacuum system for vehicles. The inventor desired to maintain a clean and neat interior and devised a design to efficiently remove crumbs, dirt, and debris. This innovative system aims to cater to car owners seeking convenience in auto cleaning processes.

data.title: Trane Technologies exceeded Q2 earnings forecast at $3.88/share but missed on sales with $5.746 billion. CEO optimistic.
data.description: Trane Technologies plc (NYSE: TT) announced its second-quarter earnings, revealing a mixed report but an optimistic outlook for the full year. They surpassed analyst expectations for earnings per share, coming in at $3.88, compared to the estimated $3.79. However, their quarterly sales of $5.746 billion fell short of the projected $5.762 billion. The company's CEO, Dave Regnery, highlighted their strong financial performance in Q2, citing record enterprise bookings, revenue growth, and a notable 18% increase in earnings per share. The Americas Commercial HVAC sector played a significant role in driving these results. Trane Technologies has raised its full-year forecast following these results.

data.title: Spire Inc. (NYSE: SR) declares $0.785 quarterly dividend per share, payable on Oct 2, 2025 to shareholders.
data.description: On July 31, 2025, the board of directors of Spire Inc. (NYSE: SR) announced a quarterly common stock dividend of $0.785 per share. The dividend is set to be paid on October 2, 2025, to shareholders who are recorded as such on September 11, 2025. Spire has a long-standing history of issuing cash dividends, dating back to 1946. This signifies a consistent commitment to rewarding shareholders, and reflects the company's stable financial performance.

data.title: FirstService Residential chosen to manage Selene Oceanfront Residences in Ft. Lauderdale high-rise. Leading property management company.
data.description: FirstService Residential, the top property management company in North America, has been chosen to provide property management and lifestyle services for a new high-rise building in Ft. Lauderdale. The announcement was made on July 31, 2025. This new project adds to the company's portfolio, showcasing its expertise in managing properties. The high-rise building in Ft. Lauderdale will benefit from FirstService Residential's experience and commitment to service excellence.

data.title: Dow Jones rises on nearing China trade deal. Arm plunges on earnings. Core inflation exceeds. Meta, Carvana enter.
data.description: On Thursday, the Dow Jones index saw an increase as signs pointed to a potential trade agreement with China. However, Arm, a partner of Nvidia, experienced a significant decrease in earnings. The stock market today showed that indexes were reducing their gains as core inflation numbers surpassed expectations. Additionally, companies like Meta and Carvana made new entries in the market.
U.S. GASOLINE DEMAND AVERAGED 9.06 MILLION BARRELS PER DAY IN MAY, MARKING THE LOWEST LEVEL FOR THE MONTH SINCE 2020, ACCORDING TO THE EIA.
U.S. DEMAND FOR CRUDE OIL AND PETROLEUM PRODUCTS, AS MEASURED BY PRODUCT SUPPLIED, ROSE IN MAY TO ITS HIGHEST LEVEL SINCE JANUARY, ACCORDING TO THE EIA.
